chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. CP No.D-811 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 02.10.2025. Mr. Amin, Assistant Director, Passport & Immigration Department, Karachi. --------------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the Order sheet reflects that the last appearance dates back to 27.03.2024. The Assistant Director, Passport & Immigration Department, Karachi is in attendance and has submitted a tracking report reflecting that the name of the Petitioner has been removed from the Passport Control List as of 6th May, 2024, which perhaps explains the subsequent absence of representation, as under the circumstances, the purpose of the Petition appears to have been served. The Petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS
